text.title: AI Product Marketing Patterns Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid AI Product Marketing Patterns output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

forbidden.pattern: demo with deterministic-result framing AND no variance disclosure
homepage headline is feature-led with no workflow framing
vs-comparison page targets a similarly-priced AI competitor

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim narrative fields to ≤500 chars preserving named entities + numeric claims.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

list.item: demo_variance_disclosure populated with a typed value
workflow_first_headlines populated with a typed value
vs_pages_audit populated with a typed value
trust_signal_density populated with a typed value
prompt_library_status populated with a typed value
owner populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
